query:
-- Add missing columns to video_call_attendance for invoice tracking
ALTER TABLE video_call_attendance 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceStatus ENUM('unpaid', 'invoiced', 'paid') DEFAULT 'unpaid',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoicedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- Verify the columns were added
DESCRIBE video_call_attendance;

ALTER TABLE video_call_attendance 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceStatus ENUM('unpaid', 'invoiced', 'paid') DEFAULT 'unpaid',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoicedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- Verify the columns were added
DESCRIBE video_call_attendance;
